title: Trading Planet
content:
Description
[
]

This planet served as a major trading hub for cultivators. After leaving 
Planet Suzaku
, 
Situ Nan
 and 
Wang Lin
 visited this world, which was regarded as a true treasure trove due to the wide variety of resources and items available for exchange. During his time here, Wang Lin obtained the Void Wood Stone, an essential material that aided in repairing his 
Star Compass
.

It was also on this planet that Wang Lin first encountered 
Bai Wei
. In addition, he came into possession of Snow Ink, which was handed to him by Situ Nan, who had stolen it from other cultivators.

Situ Nan Stealing Treasures from other Cultivators
